footer.note: Made with respect for the art.

hero.title: Learn on the mat, at your own pace.
hero.subtitle: A neighbourhood academy built on technique, respect and good people. Kids and adults, all levels.

about.title: Who you'll train with
about.body1: Galindo has spent years on the mat — first as a competitor, and for a long time now as a coach. His approach is simple: solid fundamentals, purposeful repetition, and a room where nobody feels out of place.
about.body2: We're not here for the spectacle. We're here so you understand what you're doing, train safely, and come back keen the following week.

technique.title: Technique first
technique.body: Details explained well, step by step. You progress because you understand — not because you get crushed.

community.title: Good people
community.body: A group that looks after you from day one. We train hard and always respect each other.

everyone.title: For everyone
everyone.body: Kids and adults, beginners and veterans. Everyone trains at their own pace.

schedule.title: When we train
schedule.note: Times are a guide. Confirm the details when you sign up — they can change by season.

finalCta.title: Your first class is a trial.
finalCta.body: Message us, come watch a class, and decide with no pressure. We'll see you on the mat.

signup.title: Book your first class
signup.intro: Leave us your details and the Professor will get in touch. No commitment.

form.name: Full name
form.contactPlaceholder: So we can get back to you
form.sectionHelp: Choose "Kids" if you're signing up on behalf of a minor.
form.parentNamePlaceholder: Who is responsible for the child
form.messagePlaceholder: Any questions or anything we should know?

validation.name: Please tell us your name.
validation.contact: We need a phone or email to reply to you.

errors.generic: We couldn't send that. Please try again in a moment.
errors.notConfigured: The form isn't connected to the database yet. Configure Supabase to enable it.

success.title: Got it — thank you!
success.body: We've saved your request. The Professor will write to you soon to say hello.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.intro: Questions before signing up? Message us or drop by the academy.
contact.note: To join, use the form — it's the fastest way.
